title: FEMA/FDI Advisory in Karnataka | Virtual Auditor
description: FEMA/FDI Advisory in Karnataka. From ₹15,000. FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV. FEMA compliance, FDI reporting (FC-GPR/FC-TRS), ECB complian. Contact +91 99622 60333
bodyText:
What is fema compliance & fdi advisory? FEMA compliance, FDI reporting (FC-GPR/FC-TRS), ECB compliance, ODI advisory, FEMA compounding, 15CA/15CB certification.
FEMA Compliance & FDI Advisory is a professional service offered by Virtual Auditor, an AI-powered CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm (IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333) led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV), serving clients in Karnataka, Karnataka since 2012.
Quick Answer: FEMA/FDI Advisory in Karnataka — FEMA compliance, FDI reporting (FC-GPR/FC-TRS), ECB compliance, ODI advisory, FEMA compounding, 15CA. From ₹15,000. Contact +91 99622 60333.

HEADING2: FEMA Compliance & FDI Advisory in Karnataka
Virtual Auditor provides fema compliance & fdi advisory across Karnataka. With offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai, we serve businesses throughout Karnataka with the same quality of FCA + ACS + CFE + IBBI RV-led professional services.
The ROC Bangalore handles company registrations and filings for Karnataka. Stamp duty: 0.5% on authorised capital (max ₹25L). Professional tax: ₹2,500/year.

• FDI Reporting (FC-GPR, FC-TRS, LLP-I/II)

HEADING2: Frequently Asked Questions

faqs.a: FC-GPR (Foreign Currency - Gross Provisional Return) is filed within 30 days of share allotment to a foreign investor under FDI.
When there's been a contravention of FEMA provisions — late filings, incorrect pricing, or procedural non-compliance.
Yes. We manage the intersection of FEMA, Income Tax, and Companies Act for cross-border investments and remittances.

faqs.q: Do you provide fema/fdi advisory services in Karnataka?
faqs.a: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients across Karnataka from our offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. We handle the complete process remotely with in-person meetings available at our nearest office. Contact +91 99622 60333.

faqs.q: What is the ROC jurisdiction for Karnataka?
faqs.a: Companies registered in Karnataka fall under ROC Bangalore. Virtual Auditor handles all ROC filings for Karnataka-registered companies.

faqs.q: What is the stamp duty for company registration in Karnataka?
faqs.a: Stamp duty in Karnataka: 0.5% on authorised capital (max ₹25L). Professional tax: ₹2,500/year. Contact us for exact computation based on your authorised capital.
